name: @firstpick/pi-skill-research-orchestration
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill for broad multi-claim research projects needing planning, parallel investigation, source merging, gap closure, citation audit, and final synthesis when narrower research skills are insufficient.
description_zh: 代理应在需要规划、并行调查、源合并、差距关闭、引用审核和最终合成等广泛多声明研究项目时调用此技能，当更狭窄的研究技能不足时
